nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 米兰达州
nodes.summary: 米兰达州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括Venezuelan wood quail、紫罗兰胸蜂鸟、棕尾林蜂鸟等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 莫納加斯州

nodes.name: 棕尾林蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 棕尾林蜂鸟（Rufous-shafted woodstar，学名 Chaetocercus jourdanii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛、山地森林。

nodes.name: 佩里哈山脈

nodes.name: 塔奇拉州

nodes.name: American Ornithological Society

nodes.name: 灌丛

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of rufous-shafted woodstar is found in northeastern Venezuela's Sucre and Monagas states and, according to some taxonomies, in Trinidad as well. However, the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society lists it as resident in Venezuela but only a vagrant to Trinidad. Subspecies C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: rosae is found in northern Venezuela between the states of Falcón and Miranda

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: andinus is found in the Sierra de Perijá that straddles the border between Colombia and Venezuela, the eastern Andes of Colombia, and the Andes of Venezuela between Táchira and Lara states. The rufous-shafted woodstar inhabits semi-open and open landscapes such as scrublands, the edge of montane forest, and coffee plantations; it occasionally visits the lower parts of the páramo
